message:
perf(bytes): #[inline] all Buf/BufMut trait methods and BytesMut core ops

Add #[inline] to all 35+ default trait methods in Buf (get_u8..get_f64,
copy_to_slice, chain, take) and BufMut (put_slice, put_u8..put_f64,
limit). Also add #[inline] to BytesMut core operations: freeze, reserve,
put_slice, extend_from_slice, put_u8, split_off, split_to, truncate,
clear. These are the most frequently called functions in the codebase
and missing inline prevented cross-crate optimization.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
